# Database Optimization Tool

Database Optimization Tool helps small businesses, local shops, and small software teams start database performance work with evidence-backed audits.

Current support:

- PostgreSQL: available now through a read-only audit workflow with a local collector path, no production writes, sample report guidance, and specialist escalation for hosted account, pricing, and transaction workflows.
- MySQL: planned.
- SQL Server: planned.

Important pages:

- https://databaseoptimizationtool.com/
- https://databaseoptimizationtool.com/postgresql/
- https://databaseoptimizationtool.com/postgresql/collector/
- https://databaseoptimizationtool.com/postgresql/sample-report/
- https://databaseoptimizationtool.com/postgresql/slow-query-audit/
- https://databaseoptimizationtool.com/database-optimization/
- https://databaseoptimizationtool.com/database-optimization-audit/
- https://databaseoptimizationtool.com/database-performance-audit/
- https://databaseoptimizationtool.com/sql-performance-tuning/
- https://databaseoptimizationtool.com/index-optimization/
- https://databaseoptimizationtool.com/query-optimization/
- https://databaseoptimizationtool.com/tools/
- https://databaseoptimizationtool.com/mysql/
- https://databaseoptimizationtool.com/sql-server/
